content: ZWO is XML with severe inconsistency: element names mix lowercase, snake_case, camelCase, StartCase. Power attribute Power=1.00 is a ratio (fraction of FTP), NOT watts. ftpoverride element exists but is not universally honored. Missing required fields (e.g. sportType=bike) cause silent Zwift import failure. Cadence fields optional but must be omitted (not set to 0) if unused. Best practice: validate against known-good ZWO sample before shipping.
